name: Project Horizon - Q2 2024 Executive Dashboard
description: Enterprise digital transformation initiative tracking milestone delivery and team velocity

milestones.name: Phase 1: Requirements & Design
milestones.description: Stakeholder alignment and technical architecture approved

milestones.name: Phase 2: Core Infrastructure
milestones.description: API layer and database migration in progress

milestones.name: Phase 3: Feature Integration
milestones.description: Third-party integrations and user workflow optimization

milestones.name: Phase 4: QA & Launch Prep
milestones.description: Full system testing and production readiness

workItems.title: Payment Gateway Integration
workItems.description: Completed integration with Stripe payment processing. Tested with 500+ transactions. Ready for production.

workItems.title: Customer Authentication Module
workItems.description: OAuth2 implementation with multi-factor authentication support. Deployed to staging environment.

workItems.title: Dashboard Analytics Engine
workItems.description: Real-time analytics reporting with 50+ KPI metrics. Performance optimized for 1M+ records.

workItems.title: Microservices Architecture Refactor
workItems.description: Breaking monolith into containerized microservices. 60% complete. Docker implementation in progress.

workItems.title: Mobile App Development (iOS/Android)
workItems.description: Cross-platform native app with offline-first sync. UI/UX design complete. Core functionality 45% implemented.

workItems.title: Legacy System Data Migration
workItems.description: Migrating 10 years of customer data from SQL Server 2012. Validation scripts 80% complete. Target: Q3 2024.

workItems.title: Performance Optimization Phase 2
workItems.description: Database query optimization and caching layer enhancement. Deferred due to infrastructure priority. Rescheduled for Q3.

workItems.title: Enterprise SAML Integration
workItems.description: Single sign-on implementation for enterprise customers. Requirements gathering complete. Implementation blocked pending vendor API access.
